footer.tagline: Precision industrial blades for recycling, converting, paper, metal and new energy — standard and custom-profile. Plus cast wear parts for concrete and asphalt mixing plants. Vacuum heat treatment · CMM inspection · ISO 9001:2015. Trusted by OEMs in 50+ countries since 2008.

industry.oemPipeline.headline: From Drawing To Delivery
industry.oemPipeline.subtitle: Four clear steps: you know what to send, what we confirm, and what gets checked before shipment.
industry.oemPipeline.step1.title: Send Drawing Or Sample
industry.oemPipeline.step1.desc: Send your drawing, used sample, machine model, or key dimensions. We review the application, blade geometry, material being cut, and any known fit or wear issues from your current supplier.
industry.oemPipeline.step2.title: Engineering Review
industry.oemPipeline.step2.desc: Our engineers confirm steel grade, heat treatment direction, tolerance target, edge profile, and all OEM-fit details. Any open questions are resolved before quotation or production approval is issued.
industry.oemPipeline.step3.title: Machining And Hardening
industry.oemPipeline.step3.desc: The blade moves into CNC machining, vacuum heat treatment, and precision grinding in a controlled sequence. Each stage is tracked against the approved specification to prevent distortion and geometry drift.
industry.oemPipeline.step4.title: Inspection And Shipment
industry.oemPipeline.step4.desc: Final dimensions, hardness, and edge condition are verified against specification before dispatch. The order is packed and shipped with the required inspection records, and material certification documents.
industry.plastic.seo.title: Plastic Recycling Blades | Shredder & Granulator
industry.plastic.seo.description: Shredder blades, pelletizer rotors & melt filter scraper blades for plastics recycling & compounding. PM-HSS & carbide grades. OEM fit EREMA, Maag & Coperion.
industry.plastic.seo.keywords: plastic recycling blades, strand pelletizer rotors, granulator knives, shredder blades, melt filter scraper blades, PM-HSS compounding blades, GF40 pelletizer rotor, Coperion replacement rotor
industry.plastic.hero.h2: Shredder Blades, Pelletizer Rotors & Melt Filter Scrapers
industry.plastic.hero.body1: Sureay Machinery specializes in manufacturing premium industrial knives and precision wear parts for the plastics recycling and compounding industry. Our material expertise sets us apart — from impact-resistant D2 steel for mixed post-consumer feedstocks to PM-HSS and Solid Tungsten Carbide for glass-filled and carbon-fiber-reinforced compounding lines.
industry.plastic.hero.body2: Vacuum heat treatment and 5-axis CNC machining ensure every component delivers consistent, cost-effective performance. From heavy-duty twin-shaft shredder blades and granulator knives to precision strand pelletizer rotors and continuous melt filter scraper blades, our product line covers the full plastics processing chain — 100% drop-in OEM compatible.
industry.plastic.hero.gallery1Alt: Strand pelletizer rotor for compounding lines
industry.plastic.hero.gallery2Alt: Melt filter scraper blades for continuous filtration
industry.plastic.hero.gallery3Alt: Granulator blades for plastic size reduction
industry.plastic.hero.gallery4Alt: Multi-shaft shredder blades for plastic recycling
industry.plastic.hero.gallery5Alt: Single shaft shredder blades for plastic
industry.plastic.narrative.challengeBody: Processing mixed polymers, glass-filled compounds, and post-consumer waste introduces severe abrasive wear. Standard blades degrade rapidly, forcing costly unplanned line stoppages and contaminated pellet output.
industry.plastic.narrative.solutionTitle: Engineered for the Full Processing Chain.
industry.plastic.narrative.solutionBody: PM-HSS and Tungsten Carbide rotors deliver up to 10× longer tool life on GF/CF compounds. Precision scraper blades maintain continuous melt filtration without screen shutdowns. Every component is CMM-verified for zero-defect drop-in fit (+30% Uptime).

industry.converting.seo.title: Converting Slitter Knives | Film, Nonwoven & PSA Tape
industry.converting.seo.description: Precision slitter knives for BOPP film, SMS nonwoven & PSA tape converting. ±0.002mm tolerance. Compatible with Tidland, Atlas & Kampf lines.
industry.converting.seo.keywords: slitter knives converting, film slitter knives, nonwoven slitter blades, BOPP film slitting, PSA tape slitter, flexible packaging knives
industry.converting.hero.h1: Flexible Converting & Packaging Slitter Knife Supplier
industry.converting.hero.h2: Film · Nonwoven · PSA Tape · Label Converting Blades
industry.converting.hero.body1: Sureay Machinery manufactures precision circular slitter knives and specialty cutting tools for the flexible packaging, nonwoven fabric, and label converting industries. Our tooling is engineered for high-speed lines running at 150–600 m/min across BOPP, BOPET, CPP film, SMS medical nonwoven, pressure-sensitive tape, and adhesive-laminate substrates.
industry.converting.hero.body2: From matched top-and-bottom shear pairs for film and label slitting to DLC-coated blades for PSA tape lines, every Sureay converting knife is precision ground to ±0.002mm dimensional tolerance with optional TiN and DLC anti-adhesion coatings for pressure-sensitive tape and adhesive laminate applications.
industry.converting.hero.gallery0Alt: Flexible converting and packaging industry overview
industry.converting.hero.gallery1Alt: Rotary slitter knives for flexible packaging
industry.converting.hero.gallery2Alt: Precision slitter knife for film converting
industry.converting.hero.gallery3Alt: Slitter knife array for packaging line
industry.converting.hero.gallery4Alt: Nonwoven slitter knives for SMS fabric
industry.converting.hero.gallery6Alt: CNC precision grinding for converting knives
industry.converting.hero.gallery7Alt: Premium steel material for converting blades
industry.converting.narrative.challengeB: At 400 m/min on a BOPP film line, a 0.005mm runout error per blade compounds across a 12-knife arbor, producing visible slit-width deviation, edge curl, and web tension spikes that drive unplanned downtime and customer complaints on the finished slit roll.
industry.converting.narrative.solutionBo: Sureay converting knives are precision ground to ±0.002mm thickness tolerance and ≤0.02mm T.I.R. runout, with optional DLC coating for adhesive tape converting. Consistent geometry eliminates arbor wobble and reduces Mean Time Between Replacements by 40%.

industry.metal.seo.title: Metal Processing Tooling & Coil Slitting Equipment
industry.metal.seo.description: Circular slitter knives, guillotine shear blades & punch dies for zero-burr metal coil processing. OEM-compatible with TRUMPF, AMADA & BYSTRONIC.
industry.metal.seo.keywords: metal slitting knives, guillotine shear blades, coil processing, steel cutting, metal fabrication blades
industry.metal.hero.h1: Industrial Metal Slitting & Shear Blade Manufacturer
industry.metal.hero.h2: Slitter Knives, Shear Blades & OEM Wear Parts
industry.metal.hero.body1: Sureay Machinery manufactures through-hardened circular slitter knives, guillotine shear blades, and precision punch-and-die sets engineered for continuous-run metal coil processing. We select alloys precisely—from through-hardened SKH-51 to submicron-grain Tungsten Carbide—matched to your specific strip material, thickness, and line speed.
industry.metal.hero.body2: Every knife profile is reverse-engineered from OEM drawings or customer samples, then precision-ground on our 5-axis CNC equipment and verified on a calibrated CMM. The result: drop-in slitter and shear tooling delivering burr-free edge quality from the first coil and maintained throughout the full production run.
industry.metal.hero.gallery0Alt: Industrial metal slitter knives for coil slitting equipment
industry.metal.hero.gallery2Alt: Metal shear blades for guillotine shearing
industry.metal.hero.gallery3Alt: Metal slitter knives for coil slitting
industry.metal.narrative.challengeBody: High-tensile steel and stainless coils demand extreme edge retention. Standard slitter knives develop micro-chips within hours at high line speed, producing burrs that contaminate downstream components, trigger scrap, and force costly unplanned line stops.
industry.metal.narrative.solutionBody: Our through-hardened SKH-51 and Tungsten Carbide circular knives maintain zero-burr performance across extended production runs, achieving precise slit widths on demanding materials and delivering (+45% Tool Life).

industry.paper.seo.title: Paper & Tissue Converting Knives & Equipment
industry.paper.seo.description: Tissue log saw blades, rewinder perforation knives & slitting tooling for high-speed paper & tissue converting. OEM fit Fabio Perini, Körber & Fosber.
industry.paper.seo.keywords: tissue log saw blades, paper cutting knives, guillotine blades, paper converting, printing industry blades
industry.paper.hero.h1: Paper and Tissue Knife Manufacturer — HSS & TC Grades
industry.paper.hero.h2: Log Saw Blades, Slitter Knives, Trimmer Blades & OEM Wear Parts
industry.paper.hero.body1: Sureay Machinery manufactures triple-ground tissue log saw blades, rewinder perforation knives, precision slitting tooling, and corrugated slitter-scorer blades engineered for maximum throughput on high-speed paper, tissue, and corrugated converting lines. Our blade profiles are matched to Fabio Perini, Körber, Fosber, BHS, Marquip, and all major OEM geometries.
industry.paper.hero.body2: Our in-house CNC profile grinding delivers consistent tooth form across the full blade width, while our M2 and M42 HSS grades are vacuum-hardened for optimal edge retention at 500+ m/min line speeds. Every blade ships fully inspected—blade runout, tooth pitch, and diameter all CMM-verified—for zero-rework drop-in installation.
industry.paper.hero.gallery4Alt: Rotary slitter knives for tissue converting
industry.paper.narrative.challengeBody: High-speed tissue and paper converting lines run at 500+ m/min, demanding blades that sustain a clean, consistent cut across millions of cycles. Dull or misground blades cause log tearing, fibre dust contamination, and unplanned rewinder shutdowns that erode OEE.
industry.paper.narrative.solutionBody: Our triple-ground hollow-ground tissue log saw blades are engineered to exacting OEM tooth profiles, delivering burr-free, dust-free cuts at full line speed and (+40% More Cuts Per Grind).

industry.newEnergy.seo.title: Lithium Battery Slitting Knives | New Energy
industry.newEnergy.seo.description: Tungsten carbide slitting knives for lithium-ion battery electrode foil. Ra≤0.05μm mirror finish. Compatible with Kaido, Koem & Hirano winding machines.
industry.newEnergy.seo.keywords: lithium battery slitting knives, electrode foil cutter, tungsten carbide slitter, battery slitting blade, EV battery manufacturing
industry.newEnergy.hero.h1: Lithium Battery & New Energy Precision Slitting Knife Supplier
industry.newEnergy.hero.h2: Zero-Notch Carbide Electrode Slitting · EV Cell Manufacturing
industry.newEnergy.hero.body1: Sureay Machinery manufactures tungsten carbide circular slitting knives for lithium-ion battery electrode foil processing — the critical upstream step in EV cell, energy storage, and consumer electronics battery manufacturing. Our knives achieve Ra ≤ 0.05μm mirror finish and ±0.001mm dimensional tolerance, meeting the zero-burr standard required by ISO Class 7 dry-room assembly environments.
industry.newEnergy.hero.body2: From automotive-grade NMC cathode aluminium foil to ultra-thin 6μm copper anode foil, every Sureay battery slitting knife is manufactured from submicron WC-Co tungsten carbide, individually inspected on CMM, and supplied with full material traceability documentation for IATF 16949 EV supply chain qualification.
industry.newEnergy.hero.gallery0Alt: Precision knives for new energy battery manufacturing
industry.newEnergy.hero.gallery2Alt: Carbide slitter knife for battery electrode
industry.newEnergy.hero.gallery3Alt: Precision slitting knife for lithium battery
industry.newEnergy.hero.gallery6Alt: Rotary slitter knife edge quality detail
industry.newEnergy.narrative.challengeBo: A single micro-burr on electrode foil penetrates the separator membrane, causing internal short-circuit and catastrophic cell failure. Standard slitter knives cannot hold the zero-notch Ra ≤ 0.05μm tolerance required by battery-grade aluminium and copper foil specifications.
industry.newEnergy.narrative.solutionBod: Sureay submicron WC-Co carbide knives are lapped to Ra ≤ 0.05μm and individually CMM-certified to ±0.001mm — delivering the zero-burr edge quality required for ISO Class 7 dry-room cell assembly (+8× edge life vs D2).

industry.wood.seo.title: Wood Chipper Blades & Chipper Knives | Forestry Grade | Sureay
industry.wood.seo.description: Through-hardened D2, Cr12MoV & TCT wood chipper knives for drum & disc chippers. OEM fit Bandit, Vermeer, Morbark & Doppstadt. Reversible double-edge options.
industry.wood.seo.keywords: wood chipper blades, chipper knives, drum chipper blades, disc chipper knives, biomass chipper blades, Bandit chipper blades, Vermeer chipper knives, Morbark replacement blades, forestry chipper blades, TCT chipper knives
industry.wood.hero.h1: Wood Chipper Knife Manufacturer — Forestry, Biomass & Landscape Grade
industry.wood.hero.h2: Drum Chipper Blades, Disc Chipper Knives & Counter-Knives
industry.wood.hero.body1: Sureay manufactures through-hardened drum and disc chipper knives in D2, Cr12MoV, M2 HSS, and TCT carbide-tipped configurations for industrial forestry, biomass energy production, landscape tree service, and pallet/demolition wood recycling. OEM-compatible with Bandit, Vermeer, Morbark, Doppstadt, Jenz, Peterson, CBI, and Bruks Siwertell.
industry.wood.hero.body2: Vacuum heat treatment and deep cryogenic processing (−196°C) delivers uniform HRC 55–62 from surface to core — every regrind cycle delivers identical edge performance. Reversible double-edge blades for landscape operations, and heavy-duty single-edge industrial blades for biomass plants and whole-tree chippers. Precision surface-ground to ±0.05 mm thickness parallelism for vibration-free drum balance at 2,500 RPM.
industry.wood.hero.gallery1Alt: Wood chipper in operation — forestry land clearing
industry.wood.hero.gallery2Alt: Wood chipper anvil counter-knife — D2 tool steel, precision ground
industry.wood.hero.gallery3Alt: Drum chipper blades for forestry operations
industry.wood.hero.gallery4Alt: Industrial wood chipper knives on workbench
industry.wood.hero.gallery5Alt: Installing wood chipper knives on drum chipper
industry.wood.hero.gallery6Alt: Heavy-duty chipper blades for biomass processing
industry.wood.hero.gallery7Alt: Wood chipper blades batch — multiple knives surface-ground and ready for shipment
industry.wood.narrative.challengeTitle: The Cost of a Dull Blade.
industry.wood.narrative.challengeBody: A wood chipper running dull knives doesn't just slow down — it tears fibres instead of shearing them, spikes fuel consumption by 15–25%, destroys drum bearings through vibration, and turns uniform biomass chips into off-spec splinters that fail EN 17225 screening.
industry.wood.narrative.solutionBody: Vacuum heat treatment and deep cryogenic processing at −196°C produce uniform HRC 55–62 from surface to core. Unlike case-hardened alternatives that expose a soft core after the first regrind, every Sureay chipper knife delivers identical edge performance across 8–12 regrind cycles (+2× Blade Life vs. Standard Carbon Steel).
industry.wood.narrative.highlightToken: (+2× Blade Life vs. Standard Carbon Steel)

home.hero.imageAlt: Sureay Machinery precision industrial blade manufacturing facility
home.hero.headline: Precision Industrial Blades & Knives — Custom Cutting Solutions
home.hero.body: Sureay manufactures shredder blades, granulator knives, and slitter tooling for plastic recycling, metal processing, and paper converting lines — plus cast wear parts for concrete and asphalt mixing plants. Send us your drawings or samples.
home.ecosystem.subtitle: Select your application below to explore blade materials, OEM compatibilities, and cutting solutions tailored to your production line.
home.authority.headlineLine1: The definitive OEM source for precision blades
home.mfg.headline: The Engineering Standards Behind Our Blades
home.mfg.subtitle: We eliminate the guesswork from industrial sourcing. Every Sureay blade guarantees exact OEM fitment, strict dimensional tolerances, and metallurgy optimized for your real-world cutting conditions.
home.mfg.block1.label: Advanced Manufacturing
home.mfg.block1.title: Controlled Machining For Stable Fit And Geometry
home.mfg.block1.summary: When you are replacing OEM blades or qualifying a new supplier, the first question is simple: will the geometry and fit stay consistent from one batch to the next?
home.mfg.block1.point1: 5-axis CNC machining and profile grinding keep bevels, edge alignment, and overall geometry repeatable from prototype through repeat production.
home.mfg.block1.point2: In-house vacuum heat treatment and final grinding help control distortion before shipment, reducing fit problems and uneven wear in service.
home.mfg.block1.imageAlt: 5-axis CNC precision grinding of industrial blades at Sureay Machinery
home.mfg.block2.label: Inspection Assurance
home.mfg.block2.title: Tolerance Control That Lowers Replacement Risk
home.mfg.block2.summary: A replacement blade should not create uncertainty on the shop floor. You need confidence that it will install correctly and run without extra adjustment time.
home.mfg.block2.point1: CMM inspection and optical verification are completed before release, so dimensional compliance is confirmed rather than assumed.
home.mfg.block2.point2: Where the application requires it, edge tolerances can be held down to ±0.002 mm to support high-speed drop-in replacement requirements.
home.mfg.block2.imageAlt: CMM coordinate measuring machine quality inspection of industrial cutting blades
home.mfg.block3.label: Application Engineering
home.mfg.block3.title: Material Selection Based On Real Cutting Conditions
home.mfg.block3.summary: Blade performance is rarely decided by the catalog name alone. Abrasion level, impact load, line speed, and finish requirement usually matter more.
home.mfg.block3.point1: We match steel grade and heat treatment to the actual operating condition, whether the line is converting tissue, shredding plastics, or slitting metal coils.
home.mfg.block3.point2: The result is a recommendation aimed at longer regrind intervals, more predictable blade life, and fewer avoidable replacements.
home.mfg.block3.imageAlt: Mirror-polished tissue log-saw blade engineered for industrial converting applications
home.testimonials.headline: What Our Customers Say – Trusted by Manufacturers Worldwide
home.testimonials.t1.quote: The engineering support and consistent product quality from Sureay has been instrumental in our shift to automated production lines. Their responsiveness is unmatched.
home.testimonials.t2.quote: Their expertise in metallurgy provided a blade solution that lasted 50% longer than our previous supplier. We saw significant savings in downtime and replacement costs.
home.faq.imageAlt: CNC precision manufacturing — in-house vacuum heat treatment and 5-axis grinding
home.faq.imageHeadline: Questions Teams Ask Before Sending A Blade Inquiry
home.faq.imageBody: Most RFQs start with the same practical questions: what information to send, how material is selected, what tolerance can be held, and how quickly a custom order can move.
home.faq.headline: RFQ Questions
home.faq.subtitle: Straight answers to the questions that usually come up before a drawing is sent, a tolerance is confirmed, or a custom quotation is requested.

about.seo.title: 15+ Years of Industrial Blade Engineering
about.seo.description: ISO 9001:2015 certified OEM blade manufacturer since 2008. 15,000 m² facility, 5-axis CNC grinding, vacuum heat treatment. Serving 50+ countries.
about.hero.headline: Engineering Blade Excellence
about.hero.body: Sureay specializes in high-performance industrial blades and precision machine knives, engineered for demanding production environments since 2008. ISO 9001:2015 certified. 15,000 m² facility in Ma'anshan, China.

contactPage.seo.description: Submit a blade engineering inquiry or request a quote. Reach our technical team via form, email or WhatsApp. CAD file uploads accepted.

contactPage.hero.body: Every inquiry receives a direct technical assessment from our engineering team within 24 hours. Describe your application — we'll engineer the optimal blade specification.
